result.reasoning: From step_4 of the tool call history, it is reasoned that the Minister of Interior in Albania (Saimir TAHIRI) and the Minister Without Portfolio in Kosovo (Edita TAHIRI) share the same surname TAHIRI as per January 2015 CIA data. Thus, the two countries are Albania and Kosovo. The user requests the names "using the titles of their English Wikipedia pages as of August 2023." Step_5 and step_6 in the tool call history attempted to verify Wikipedia page titles but did not output specific titles; however, based on the identified countries and common naming conventions, I infer that the English Wikipedia page titles as of August 2023 are "Albania" and "Kosovo." In alphabetical order, the comma-separated list is "Albania, Kosovo." The casing is preserved from step_4 where the countries are written with initial capitals, which aligns with standard proper noun casing. Applied casing rule: preserving the casing from the identified source.
